News Reports

Current Operations

    Other Operations

    Operation Epic Fury / Operation Roaring Lion | Operation True Promise 4

  • Iran War Ripples Across Middle East, Caucasus With New Attacks RFE/RL 07 Mar 2026 -- The war in Iran is widening across the Middle East and beyond, with incidents stretching from the Persian Gulf to the South Caucasus and raising fears the conflict could escalate into a broader regional confrontation.
  • With Top Brass Dead, Iran Deploys Decentralized 'Mosaic' Strategy To Boost Defenses RFE/RL 07 Mar 2026 -- Iran's powerful Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps (IRGC) has decentralized its command-and-control structure, handing junior ranks more power to respond to the massive US-Israeliaerial bombardment of the Islamic republic.
  • True Promise 4: Iran and resistance axis ops. against US-Israeli assets on Mar. 7 Press TV 07 Mar 2026 -- Iranian armed forces and resistance groups across the region continue to carry out retaliatory military operations against the United States and the Israeli regime.
  • IRGC: Hundreds of US, Israeli targets struck in first week of Op. True Promise 4 Press TV 07 Mar 2026 -- The spokesperson for the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) says Iran's Armed Forces have carried out extensive missile and drone strikes during the first week of Operation True Promise 4 in response to the Israeli-American aggression.
  • IRGC targets US-operated oil tanker with suicide drone Press TV 07 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) Navy said Saturday its forces fired a kamikaze drone against the US-operated Louise p oil tanker in the Persian Gulf waters, and the unmanned aircraft struck the designated target precisely.
  • Iranian Army says 82 American and Israeli drones shot down since war began Press TV 07 Mar 2026 -- The Iranian Army said in a Saturday statement that the integrated network of air defense systems operated by the Joint Air Defense Command had downed 13 more advanced drones over the past 24 hours.
  • Any point of aggression against Iran 'a legitimate target': Armed forces spokesman Press TV 07 Mar 2026 -- A senior spokesperson for Iran's armed forces says any location identified as a source of aggression against the Islamic Republic of Iran will be a legitimate target.
  • 220 US forces killed or wounded in Iranian retaliatory strikes in past 24 hours Press TV 07 Mar 2026 -- An Iranian Army spokesman says 220 American soldiers and commanders have been killed or wounded and significant damage has been inflicted on American assets in the region in retaliatory attacks by the Iranian Armed Forces over the past 24 hours.
  • Iran conducted no attack on neighbors, respects their sovereignty, interests: Army headquarters Press TV 07 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters says Iranian Armed Forces respect the national interests and sovereignty of neighboring countries and have not carried out any act of aggression against them.
  • IRGC navy drone unit launches massive attack on key US air base Press TV 07 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) Navy's drone squadron has launched a large‑scale strike on the strategic US air base Al Dhafra in the UAE, hitting key facilities used by American forces in the Persian Gulf and Strait of Hormuz region.
  • Iran Navy announces wave of fresh drone strikes on US bases, strategic Israeli sites Press TV 07 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Republic of Iran Navy has announced that its kamikaze drones conducted large-scale attacks targeting US military bases in the region as well as strategic sites in the Israeli-occupied territories.
  • US-Israel war against Iran enters Day 7 amid thick smoke in Tehran and fears of another Middle East quagmire for Washington Global Times 07 Mar 2026 -- With thick smoke and explosions engulfing Tehran, the joint US-Israeli military operation against Iran has entered its one-week mark. Meanwhile, in Washington, concerns are mounting over whether the US is being dragged into another Middle East quagmire and the enormous military expenditures involved.
  • Iran launches new wave of attacks on Israel People's Daily 07 Mar 2026 -- Iran has launched a new wave of attacks on Israel, using ballistic missiles, including its latest super-heavy Khorramshahr-4, the Islamic Revolution Guard Corps (IRGC) was quoted as saying on Friday by the semi-official Tasnim news agency.

  • Statement by PM Netanyahu - 7 March 2026 Israel - Prime Minister 07 Mar 2026 -- PM Netanyahu: "Many countries see today exactly who can be trusted. Israel serves as a beacon of strength and hope. Thanks to this strength, we will be able to expand the circle of security, peace, and prosperity in the future on a scale we have never known."
  • After A Week Of War, Israel Sees Progress But Long Road Ahead RFE/RL 07 Mar 2026 -- Hidden away on a small street in a central district of town, the ruins of war come as something of a surprise. On nearby streets, hipsters fill outdoor cafes, Lime scooters clutter the sidewalks, and children play in parks. But turn a corner and you'll see blackened walls, smashed windows, and rubble-strewn cars.
  • Israeli army admits failure to intercept Iranian missile barrages: Report Press TV 07 Mar 2026 -- The Israeli military has admitted that US-built Israeli radar systems have been largely unable to intercept incoming Iranian missiles.

  • Trump Considers Deploying US Troops in Iran - Reports Sputnik 07 Mar 2026 -- US President Donald Trump has privately expressed interest in deploying troops to Iran and discussed the matter with his aides, NBC News reported, citing officials and other sources.
  • US 'Looking At' Potential Candidates To Lead Iran, As Tehran's Assembly Of Experts Expected To Convene RFE/RL 07 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Assembly of Experts is set to meet to select a new supreme leader, one of its members said on March 7, as the White House said it was looking for an "acceptable" candidate to lead the country.
  • The United States Condemns Iranian Drone Attack on the Republic of Azerbaijan US Dept. of State 07 Mar 2026
  • US intelligence says 'regime change' not possible in Iran even with broader war Press TV 07 Mar 2026 -- A classified assessment by the National Intelligence Council has concluded that even a large-scale military offensive against Iran would be unlikely to topple the country's political and security establishment.
  • US worried over dwindling ammunition stocks in war against Iran: Report Press TV 07 Mar 2026 -- American officials worry about the rapid depletion of the US military's advanced weaponry amid the ongoing military aggression on Iran.
  • US confirms Iran destroyed $300m radar system in Jordan Press TV 07 Mar 2026 -- The US confirmed that Iran has destroyed a key $300 million radar system used by US THAAD missile defense systems at Muwaffaq Salti Air Base in Jordan.
  • Trump says he seeks U.S.-friendly new Iranian leader People's Daily 07 Mar 2026 -- U.S. President Donald Trump said on Friday the White House is seeking a new Iranian leader who can "treat the United States and Israel well" and he is not concerned whether the Middle Eastern country becomes a democracy.

  • Iran's president apologises to neighbouring countries as Israel pounds Tehran Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 07 Mar 2026 -- The Iranian president, Masoud Pezeshkian, has just been quoted as saying he apologises to neighbouring countries, according to Guardian.
  • Iranian president says to halt attacks on neighbors unless it's targeted from those countries People's Daily 07 Mar 2026 -- Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian said on Saturday that Iran has decided not to attack or fire missiles at targets in neighboring countries from now on unless it is targeted from those countries.
  • US insolence won't go unanswered; it will not be let off the hook: Security chief Press TV 07 Mar 2026 -- Iran's top security official has warned that the United States' hostile actions against the Islamic Republic will not go unanswered, stressing that Tehran will rely on the determination of its people to confront the American aggression.
  • Iran to keep striking enemy targets in region used in acts of aggression: Judiciary chief Press TV 07 Mar 2026 -- Iran's judiciary chief Gholam Hossein Mohseni-Ejei says the armed forces will continue to carry out powerful attacks on US and Israeli military bases and assets in the region that are being used in acts of aggression against the Islamic Republic.
  • No security possible in region while US maintains military presence: Qalibaf Press TV 07 Mar 2026 -- Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf has warned regional countries that they will experience persistent insecurity as long as they host US military bases.
  • Iranian armed forces 'await' US Navy deployment to Strait of Hormuz: Official Press TV 07 Mar 2026 -- The Iranian armed forces are eagerly awaiting the arrival of US forces that Washington has claimed would be deployed to escort oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz, a military official said.
  • Iran slams airport attacks as 'another wicked chapter' in US-Israel terror campaign Press TV 07 Mar 2026 -- Iran has condemned as "cowardly" the attack on civilian airports and the targeting of a passenger aircraft by the United States and Israel, calling it another wicked chapter in "a campaign of terror and atrocity" against Iranians.
  • Pezeshkian: Enemies will take dream of Iran's surrender to grave Press TV 07 Mar 2026 -- Iran's President Masoud Pezeshkian says the enemies will take the dream of Iran's surrender to the grave, lauding the nation for their perseverance in the face of US-Israeli atrocities.
  • Iran claims attacks on U.S., Israeli targets as Israel intercepting Iranian missiles People's Daily 07 Mar 2026 -- Iran's armed forces said Friday that they attacked U.S. and Israeli targets across the region, while the Israel Defense Forces said its air defense systems were intercepting another missile launch from Iran.
  • Iran condemns U.S. for targeting naval vessel in int'l waters People's Daily 07 Mar 2026 -- Iranian Foreign Minister Seyed Abbas Araghchi has condemned the United States for targeting Iran's IRIS Dena frigate without any warning in international waters 2,000 km off the Iranian coasts.
  • Iran blasts UN chief for downplaying US-Israeli atrocities Press TV 07 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman has sharply criticized the secretary-general of the United Nations for downplaying the human toll of the fresh unprovoked US-Israeli aggression against the Islamic Republic.

  • HE GCCSG Condemns in the Strongest Terms the Treacherous Iranian Aggression Targeting Buildings in the Kingdom of Bahrain Housing Personnel from the Qatari Amiri Naval Forces Gulf Cooperation Council 07 Mar 2026
  • HE GCCSG Conducts Telephone Calls with Their Highnesses and Excellencies the GCC Foreign Ministers to Discuss Developments Regarding Nefarious Iranian Attacks on Council States Gulf Cooperation Council 07 Mar 2026
  • Azerbaijan`s Foreign Ministry: We highly appreciate the statement of the United States Department of State condemning the drone attacks carried out by Iran against Azerbaijan Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 07 Mar 2026 -- "We highly appreciate the statement of the United States Department of State condemning the drone attacks carried out by Iran against the territory of the Republic of Azerbaijan and expressing solidarity with our country," says a commentary by Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Azerbaijan.
  • Azerbaijani, Turkish FMs strongly condemn attacks on both countries Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 07 Mar 2026 -- On March 7, Azerbaijan's Foreign Minister Jeyhun Bayramov met with his Türkish counterpart Hakan Fidan in Istanbul on the sidelines of the informal meeting of the Council of Foreign Ministers of the Member States of the Organization of Turkic States (OTS).
  • Spanish PM: U.S.-Israeli military action against Iran "extraordinary mistake" People's Daily 07 Mar 2026 -- Spanish Prime Minster Pedro Sanchez said on Friday that the U.S.-Israeli military action against Iran is an "extraordinary mistake" and rejected criticism from U.S. President Donald Trump for Spain's refusal to allow the U.S. to use its bases in the country in the ongoing aerial assault.
  • Deputy prime ministers, foreign ministers of Poland and United Arab Emirates meet to discuss situation in Middle East Poland - Ministry of Foreign Affairs 07 Mar 2026 -- On 7 March, Deputy Prime Minister Radosław Sikorski and Deputy Prime Minister Sheikh Abdullah bin Zayed Al Nahyan met in Warsaw to talk about their assessment of the consequences of the latest events in the Middle East for Poland and the United Arab Emirates.
  • Russia Ready to Help Stop Bloodshed in Middle East - Foreign Ministry Sputnik 07 Mar 2026 -- Russia is ready to actively assist in finding ways to stop the bloodshed in the Middle East and reaching solutions based on a balance of interests, the Russian Foreign Ministry stated on Saturday.
  • Council of Foreign Ministers of Organization of Turkic States issues joint statement on recent developments in Middle East Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 07 Mar 2026 -- "The Council of Foreign Ministers of the Member States of the Organization of Turkic States (OTS) convened in Istanbul on 7 March 2026 and held extensive consultations on the regional and global developments, including the ongoing armed conflicts and hostilities recently hiked up in their surrounding area, which cause human suffering, loss of life and large-scale humanitarian challenges.
  • Joint Statement of the Council of Foreign Ministers of the Organization of Turkic States on Recent Developments in the Middle East - Istanbul, 7 March 2026 Republic of Turkey Ministry of Foreign Affairs 07 Mar 2026
  • PM call with President Erdoğan of Türkiye: 7 March 2026 Gov.UK 07 Mar 2026
  • Spanish PM: U.S.-Israeli military action against Iran "extraordinary mistake" People's Daily 07 Mar 2026 -- Spanish Prime Minster Pedro Sanchez said on Friday that the U.S.-Israeli military action against Iran is an "extraordinary mistake" and rejected criticism from U.S. President Donald Trump for Spain's refusal to allow the U.S. to use its bases in the country in the ongoing aerial assault.
  • Outcome of ROK-Bahrain Foreign Ministers' Telephone Conversation (March 7) ROK MFA 07 Mar 2026

  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Two Ballistic Missiles Launched Toward Prince Sultan Air Base Intercepted and Destroyed SPA 07 Mar 2026 -- Spokesperson of the Ministry of Defense Major General Turki Al-Maliki stated that two ballistic missiles launched toward Prince Sultan Air Base were intercepted and destroyed
  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Four Drones Heading Toward Shaybah Field Intercepted and Destroyed in the Empty Quarter SPA 07 Mar 2026 -- Spokesperson of the Ministry of Defense Major General Turki Al-Maliki stated that four drones heading toward the Shaybah field were intercepted and destroyed in the Empty Quarter
  • Defense Minister Receives Pakistan's Chief of Army Staff to Discuss Mutual Defense Following Iranian Attacks SPA 07 Mar 2026 -- Minister of Defense Prince Khalid bin Salman bin Abdulaziz met in Riyadh with Pakistan's Chief of Army Staff and Chief of Defense Forces Field Marshal Asim Munir, with whom he discussed Iranian attacks on the Kingdom within the framework of the Saudi-Pakistani Strategic Mutual Defense Agreement, focusing on mechanisms to halt these aggressions which undermine regional security and stability
  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Drone Intercepted and Destroyed East of Riyadh SPA 07 Mar 2026 -- Ministry of Defense spokesperson Major General Turki Al-Maliki stated that a drone was intercepted and destroyed east of Riyadh
  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Four Drones Heading Toward Shaybah Field Were Intercepted and Destroyed in the Empty Quarter SPA 07 Mar 2026 -- Spokesperson of the Ministry of Defense Major General Turki Al-Maliki stated that four drones heading toward the Shaybah field were intercepted and destroyed in the Empty Quarter
  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Ballistic Missile Launched Toward Prince Sultan Air Base Intercepted and Destroyed SPA 07 Mar 2026 -- Spokesperson of the Ministry of Defense Major General Turki Al-Maliki stated that a ballistic missile launched toward Prince Sultan Air Base was intercepted and destroyed
  • HRH the Crown Prince, British Prime Minister Discuss Regional Security; Starmer Affirms Support for Saudi Arabia SPA 07 Mar 2026
  • HRH the Crown Prince, Cypriot President Discuss Regional Security in Phone Call SPA 07 Mar 2026
  • HRH the Crown Prince Phones Turkish President, Condemns Iranian Attacks SPA 07 Mar 2026

  • Israeli NGO Head Ksenia Svetlova: Iran Still 'Firing Like Crazy' RFE/RL 07 Mar 2026 -- Israel has made an impressive start to military operations against Iran but may be not much closer to its goals than a week ago, former Knesset member Ksenia Svetlova told RFE/RL in an interview at her home in Tel Aviv on March 6.

Defense Policy / Programs

  • US, Kenya expand innovation, crisis response readiness during Justified Accord 2026 MEDCAP Army News 07 Mar 2026 -- U.S. service members, Kenya Defence Forces and local civilian medical teams delivered critical healthcare to Samburu County communities during a Medical Civic Action Program, MEDCAP, as part of Justified Accord 2026, Feb. 26-27, 2026.

  • NATO is well postured to defend Allied populations against ballistic threats NATO Allied Land Command 07 Mar 2026 -- On Thursday (5 March 2026), the North Atlantic Council met in Ambassadorial format for an update on the security environment, in light of Iran's continued and indiscriminate attacks across the Middle East and beyond.

  • A Russian Soldier Thought He'd Be Deployed To Africa. When They Ordered Him To Ukraine, He Fled. RFE/RL 07 Mar 2026

  • Xi stresses enhancing political loyalty in military to advance defense modernization PRC MND 07 Mar 2026 -- Chinese President Xi Jinping on Saturday stressed fully leveraging the unique strengths of enhancing political loyalty in the military, and called for concerted efforts to advance the modernization of national defense and the armed forces in a steady and sustained manner.

  • Ministry of National Defense Issues Press Release Regarding Media Reports That "Military Procurement Requires a Letter of Offer and Acceptance Before Budget Allocation" ROC MND 07 Mar 2026

  • UK reveals military maintenance facilities in Ukraine for first time UK MOD 07 Mar 2026 -- The UK has revealed for the first time its maintenance, repair and overhaul systems (MRO) facilities in Ukraine, with four operational and a fifth planned.

  • INDIAN ARMY'S CENTRAL COMMAND CONDUCTS ITS FIRST-EVER STRATEGIC COMMUNICATION CONCLAVE IN LUCKNOW India PIB 07 Mar 2026 -- The Indian Army's Central Command conducted its first-ever Strategic Communication Conclave in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh on March 07, 2026

  • U.S. approves sale of 12,000 bombs to Israel People's Daily 07 Mar 2026 -- The U.S. State Department said Friday that it has approved a possible Foreign Military Sale to Israel of munitions and related support services, including 12,000 aerial bombs.

  • Secretary Rubio's Meeting with Western Hemisphere Presidents US Dept. of State 07 Mar 2026

  • COMMITMENT TO COUNTERING CARTEL CRIMINAL ACTIVITY The White House 07 Mar 2026
  • Secretary of State Marco Rubio and Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem at the Shield of the Americas Summit Working Lunch US Dept. of State 07 Mar 2026

Defense Industry

Other Conflicts


    Ukraine Conflict News

    Operation Iron Swords / Operation Al-Aqsa Flood | Operation Northern Arrows | Giddeon's Chariots

  • Lebanon 'dragged back into turmoil', UN envoy warns UN News 07 Mar 2026 -- Lebanon has been "dragged back into a state of turmoil and violence", the UN's top envoy in the country warned on Saturday, after the latest round of regional strikes triggered a fast-escalating crisis along the Blue Line. What had been fragile but real momentum, she said, has now collapsed in a matter of days.

  • The OIC condemns and warns against the continued closure of the Al-Aqsa Mosque by the Israeli occupation Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) 07 Mar 2026 -- The General Secretariat of the Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) strongly condemned the Israeli occupation authorities' continued closure of the blessed Al-Aqsa Mosque and the prevention of worshippers from reaching it for the eighth consecutive day, considering this a blatant violation of the sanctity of holy places and the right to freedom of worship, and a provocation to the feelings of Muslims in the world
  • Spanish Government strongly condemns massive attacks against Lebanon Spain MFA 07 Mar 2026 -- The Spanish Government strongly condemns the massive attacks against Lebanon and extends its condolences and solidarity to the families of the civilian victims, the number of which continues to rise.

    • Other Conflicts

  • PLA warns and expels Philippine aircraft illegally intruding into territorial airspace over China's Huangyan Dao: source Global Times 07 Mar 2026 -- According to source, multiple Philippine aircraft recently illegally intruded into the territorial airspace over China's Huangyan Dao without the permission of the Chinese government. The Chinese People's Liberation Army organized naval and air forces to conduct tracking, monitoring, warning and expulsion in accordance with laws and regulations.

  • China denounces Australia's provocative operations in Yellow Sea PRC MND 07 Mar 2026 -- China on Friday rejected accusations by Australia about an aircraft encounter over the Yellow Sea and expressed strong dissatisfaction and firm opposition against Australia's distortion of facts.
  • China's MND expresses strong dissatisfaction, firm opposition to Australian side's distortion of facts over its provocative actions in Yellow Sea and East China Sea Global Times 07 Mar 2026 -- China's Ministry of National Defense on Friday expressed strong dissatisfaction and firm opposition to the Australian side's distorting remarks regarding the provocative actions of Australian naval forces in the Yellow Sea and East China Sea, urging the Australian side to earnestly respect China's sovereignty and security concerns, immediately stop spreading disinformation.

  • ICC rejects Duterte appeal for interim release Philippine News Agency 07 Mar 2026 -- The International Criminal Court (ICC) Appeals Chamber has rejected the appeal of former president Rodrigo Duterte's camp seeking his interim release from detention.

News Reports

  • 'We firmly oppose, will resolutely fight against it': deputy to 14th NPC from Xinjiang responds to certain sanctions citing so-called 'forced labor' Global Times 07 Mar 2026 -- "Using the so-called allegations of 'forced labor' under the pretext of human rights, some disregarded facts, acted recklessly, and flagrantly trampled on international law and international trade rules. They engaged in political manipulation and economic bullying, attempting to use Xinjiang-related issues to contain China and hinder China's development. We firmly oppose this and will resolutely fight against it," Wang Kuiran, deputy to the 14th National People's Congress (NPC) and Secretary General of the people's government of Northwest China's Xinjiang Uygur Autonomous Region, said at the ongoing "two sessions."

  • PLA activities in the waters and airspace around Taiwan ROC MND 07 Mar 2026

  • Enlarged Plenary Meetings of Pyongyang Municipal and Provincial Committees of WPK KCNA 07 Mar 2026 -- Enlarged plenary meetings of Pyongyang municipal and provincial committees of the Workers' Party of Korea were held on March 5 and 6 to implement the decisions of the Ninth Congress of the WPK and the First Plenary Meeting of the Ninth Central Committee of the WPK.

  • Trump claims Cuba will "fall pretty soon" People's Daily 07 Mar 2026 -- U.S. President Donald Trump threatened Friday that Cuba is going to "fall pretty soon," but his administration will focus on the ongoing war with Iran "right now."

  • Hungary to Decide Fate of Money Seized From Ukrainians Once Ownership Is Clear - Orban Sputnik 07 Mar 2026 -- Hungary will keep the money confiscated from Ukrainians until its ownership is cleared up, Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban said on Saturday.
